/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import Symbol
from sympy.physics.secondquant import B, Bd, F, Fd, Commutator
from sympy.printing.latex import latex, LatexPrinter
x = Symbol('0')
for expr in [Bd(x), Bd(x)**2, B(x)**2, Fd(x), Fd(x)**2, Commutator(Bd(x)**2, B(x))]:
    print(repr(expr), '=>', latex(expr))
print('raw Bd _latex:', Bd(x)._latex(LatexPrinter()))
print('raw Fd _latex:', Fd(x)._latex(LatexPrinter()))
PY

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python -c \"from sympy import symbols; from sympy.physics.secondquant import AntiSymmetricTensor,Bd,Fd; from sympy.printing.latex import latex; a,b,i,j=symbols('a b i j'); t=AntiSymmetricTensor('t',(a,b),(i,j)); print(latex(t)); print(latex(t**2)); print(latex(Bd(a)**2, parenthesize_super=True)); print(latex(Fd(a)**2, parenthesize_super=True))\"
rg -n \"class SqOperator|class AntiSymmetricTensor|is_commutative\" sympy/physics/secondquant.py | head -n 80
sed -n '145,235p' sympy/physics/secondquant.py
sed -n '325,405p' sympy/physics/secondquant.py"
